MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SALLY STEINHART TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION:
APPEAR: Sally Steinhart, Esq. 707/544-4314 pltf & moving party in pro per; Steven S. Weil, Esq. 925/838-2090 for defts & opposing parties Parkview Heights Homeowners Association, Chandler Properties and Association Lien Services.
